prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-RECTANGLE-TOOLBAG-AB77 Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Rock Hounding Equipment Tools Metal Detector Bag, Treasure Hunter Acccessories (Green, 18" x 8.5" x 11") Description: Hit the great outdoors with the right gear and never miss an overturned treasure hiding in plain sight.

The ASR Outdoor carry-all bag was designed to hold all of your metal detecting gear and rock hounding equipment. It works remarkably well for a multitude of different activities and features a truly classic two-tone design in thick, heavy-duty ripstop nylon that is double stitched at all stress points to ensure that it will last through many years of beach combing with your metal detector in the sand or rock hopping up bolders looking for geodes.

The bag itself measures 18" x 9" x 11" when open, and has a sturdy zip closure at the top of the bag. Both sides of the bag feature side pockets so you can have easy access to your most commonly used tools and accessories. The bag has 2 top carry handles, and also comes with a separate adjustable shoulder strap that you can attach to the bag for additional carrying options. The bottom of the bag has a built-in bottom storage compartment and metal lined rim, so you don't have to worry about it losing its shape over time.

Gold prospecting, metal detecting and rockhounding are great outdoor activities that can be enjoyed by both adults and kids alike. If you're looking to get into these fun hobbies, ASR Outdoor has you covered with the right gear for your activity. Get out there and explore, and maybe you'll even strike it rich. Search Terms: metal detecting accessories tool bags rock hounding equipment for adults beginner rockhounding tools geology gifts pay dirt rocks gems tumbler supplies Features: - METAL DETECTOR TREASURE FINDS BAG: The carry-all bag is well suited for a multitude of hobby activities; designed to hold all of your metal detecting equipment, and rock hounding supplies, while providing ample storage for recovered raw material in the field - COMPARTMENTS AND POCKETS: Featuring a large, main compartment that acts as a raw materials collection area, there are 6 total expandable pockets to keep your tools organized; interior side pockets that allows quick access and separation for notepads, diagrams and maps as well as a muddy tool compartment below the main compartment that allows for separation of tools and specimens - QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Featuring double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of rockhounding and metal detecting beach combing trips. Made of high quality nylon that is weather-resistant so you can count on it to protect your tools and supplies rain or shine - 2 CARRY OPTIONS: The bag comes with 2 top carry handles and an additional 44" adjustable shoulder strap so you can carry it however is most comfortable for you - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18" x 8.5" x 11", Color: Black with Green and Yellow; Material: Nylon; Adjustable Strap Length: 44 inches; Sturdy Zip Closure === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 18" x 8.5" x 11" Metal Detector Bag

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 18in Green Metal Detector Bag
